# Manual Utest Migration

- Active step: `.github/plans/manual-utest-migration-3-tools-and-core-ds.md`
- Overview: `.github/plans/manual-utest-migration-overview.md`
- Iteration state: `Steps 1, 2, and 3 are approved and complete on feature/manual-utest-migration-1-cutover, and the step-3 closeout bookkeeping is now recorded on the branch.`
- Approved code head: `7cf5d491504c87db4fd2c8dbcce15cfff4e869fe on feature/manual-utest-migration-1-cutover, from clean baseline e902a4633ee5d45a3488270ea48e9d7215ed914c.`
- Step-3 outcome summary: `The authored suite now has semantic manual coverage for ArrayTools, MathTools, ImageTools, Array2D, ByteArray, Color, Pixel, Histogram, Queue, QueueCell, ImageFormat, and PixelFormat; shared CollectionAssertions/ColorAssertions helpers were added; the manual inventory marks these modules as manual; and the review loop fixed the exposed Queue.has, ByteArray.getInt8, MathTools.isBetweenRange(s), ArrayTools.distanceTo, and Histogram.length defects instead of deferring them.`
- Foundation carried forward: `Step 1 established tests/src plus the checked-in manual inventory as the operational test root, and step 2 added deterministic suite/case filtering, ManualSuites registration, shared support helpers, VS Code task entrypoints, and the documented Windows filter contract.`
- Accepted waiver: `D-003 remains in force only for tests/generated/src/Main.hx#L6 and tests/generated/src/Main.hx#L7, where the retained reference-only generated runner still shows unresolved utest.Runner and PrettyReporter diagnostics until step 7 deletes tests/generated and tests/compile.hxml.`
- Local verification context: `This Windows Haxe build still rejects direct haxe test.hxml -- --tests ... and haxe tests/ci/local-ci.hxml -- --targets=interp --compile-only passthrough before Main or LocalCi runs, so local filtered runs continue to rely on the documented VISION_TESTS, VISION_TEST_CASES, and VISION_CI_* environment-variable fallbacks.`
- Residual non-blocking context: `Beyond D-003, only the pre-existing utest enum-abstract warning and deprecated Gauss/ImageTools warning noise remain in the recorded filtered runs.`
- Next recovery action: `Retarget the iteration to .github/plans/manual-utest-migration-4-image-and-geometry-ds.md and begin the image/geometry suite rewrite with D-003 plus the Windows filtered-run fallback carried forward.`
